creator: freebsd-vheg@riseup.net
text:
Hi,

unbound privides a munin plugin, what do you think about including it?

Before creating this bugzilla entry I assumed that you might just include it if it is included in 
https://github.com/munin-monitoring/contrib

but since it is in unbound upstream it will not live in munin-monitoring/contrib:
https://github.com/munin-monitoring/contrib/issues/917


The plugin can be found here:
https://unbound.nlnetlabs.nl/svn/trunk/contrib/unbound_munin_
